SEARCH
Package com.example.lottery.model

Class NotificationItem

java.lang.Object
com.example.lottery.model.NotificationItem
public class NotificationItem extends Object
Model class representing a notification in a user's inbox.

Target Firestore path: users/{userId}/inbox/{notificationId}

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NotificationItem()
    Default constructor for Firestore serialization.
    NotificationItem(String notificationId, String title, String message, String type, String eventId, String eventTitle, String senderId, String senderRole, boolean isRead, com.google.firebase.Timestamp createdAt)
    Full constructor for a user inbox notification.
